rationale: The "relaxing puzzle / hand-moves-vehicles" hook is mechanically incompatible with Helix Jump — there's no grid, no stylus drag, and no parking/unblock logic; the game is reflex-based rotation and falling, not deliberate puzzle solving. Audience overlap is decent (broad casual mobile players), but the calm, satisfaction emotional pitch clashes with Helix Jump's energetic/competitive mood and neon palette, so adapting this hook would require a near-total rebuild rather than a swap-in. Recommend skipping, or only borrowing the "Have you played a game that..." VO framing applied to Helix's own bouncing/smashing footage.
